name: Carrot Pineapple Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple, reserving the juice.
2. Add enough skim milk to the reserved juice to make 3/4 cup of liquid, then set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine the whole wheat flour, brown sugar, baking powder, salt, sugar, and cinnamon.
4. Add the grated carrots, vegetable oil, beaten egg, and vanilla to the dry ingredients.
5. Stir until just moistened and no flour streaks remain.
6. Spoon the batter into muffin tins coated with non-stick spray, filling each cup 2/3 full.
7. Bake at 375 degrees F. for 20 to 25 minutes or until done.
8. Serve warm.
